emails.subject: RE: Pooling Point Purchase GTC
emails.body: RE: Pooling Point Purchase GTC Gerald, Do we have a format for producer gas that is not committed and not pool gas? (i.e. Linder cannot "commit" their gas to us because of credit reasons but the gas is still 100% ours for the month) Thanks, Judy

emails.subject: RE: Pooling Point Purchase GTC
emails.body: Judy, I will be working on that form next. Should be ready tommorrow or Monday. For the Linder dealer we can use the firm GTC with a modified DCQ. I forwarded the language for the DCQ to Ellen.

emails.subject: RE: Pooling Point Purchase GTC
emails.body: Thank you. I don't mean to bug you. I'm having trouble keeping all of our forms straight. Thanks, Judy
